sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111976" key="foiniko/legnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φοινῑκό-λεγνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111976.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">red-streaked,</tr_> of the bird <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πηνέλοψ,</foreign> Ion Trag.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0033.tlg001.perseus-grc1:68" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">68</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
